title: Azu Family Pack [Cobblemon]
description: A simple resource/datapack to add Azurill, Marill and Azumarill to Cobblemon. They have sleeping, swimming, and attack animations.
body: Adds the Azu family early. You can find them in river biomes and any biome that has the freshwater tag, on the ground or in the water, except azurill can only be found on ground, since it cannot swim yet.
